zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill於1465年10月3日出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾洛華諾時，他的父親Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun25歲，母親Elizabeth Ross30歲。他於1479年10月3日之前與Lady Margaret Colville結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年47歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Sempill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Semple
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): nickname from Middle English, Older Scots, and Old French simple ‘simple, straightforward, humble’ (from Latin simplus). The Scottish name was taken to Ulster in the 17th century, and a Scottish family of this name held the hereditary post of Sheriff of Renfrewshire from the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill was born on 3 October 1465, in Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Ross, was 30. He married Lady Margaret Colville before 3 October 1479. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Branxton, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill est né le 3 octobre 1465, à Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ross, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Colville avant 3 octobre 1479. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill am 3. Oktober 1465 in Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Ross 30. Er hat vor 3. Oktober 1479 Lady Margaret Colville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England und wurde in Branxton, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill è nato il il 3 ottobre 1465 nel Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Ross, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Colville prima del 3 ottobre 1479. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Branxton, Northumberland, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Branxton, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempillが1465年10月3日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアロチウィノチで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstounは25歳，母Elizabeth Rossは30歳であった。1479年10月3日以前にLady Margaret Colvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで47歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill(이)가 1465년 10월 3일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 럭윈옥h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Ross(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1479년 10월 3일 이전 Lady Margaret Colville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill nasceu em 3 de outubro de 1465, em Lochwinnoch, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Ross, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Colville antes 3 de outubro de 1479. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill родился 3 октября 1465 г. в местности лочвиннох, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ross, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Colville перед 3 октябрь 1479 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Margaret Colville antes de 3 de octubre de 1479. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
